top_signals.title: Bird Construction Readies Its First Corporate Bond Sale
top_signals.summary: Bird Construction, a Canadian building firm recently named the lead construction partner for a data center in Saskatchewan, is looking to sell bonds for the first time, and aims to raise around C$250 million ($181 million), according to people with knowledge of the matter.
top_signals.why_it_matters: AI and semiconductor developments impacting technology leadership and capex cycles.
